req.title: Announcement rollout — variant 3
req.statement: A system-admin shall publish an org-wide announcement to employees in chosen departments; publishing without any department selection shall be rejected. Additionally, the action must emit a webhook event for external consumers.

doc.reasoning: The requirement covers three concerns: (1) successful org-wide announcement publication to selected departments, (2) rejection when no departments are selected (422), and (3) webhook emission. Test design applies EP for the happy path (valid departments selected), NEG for the zero-department error path, BVA for the minimum valid selection (exactly one department), DT for the webhook emission rule, and STC for the state transition from draft to published. We derive at least four tests to cover all mandatory kinds and heuristics. Each test is self-contained using fixtures for auth and cleanup, and assertions are kept concise.

tests.name: test_publish_announcement_to_multiple_departments_succeeds
preconditions: At least two departments exist in the organisation
No prior announcement with the same title exists
actions: Fill in announcement title and body
Select two or more departments from the department picker
expected: HTTP 201 or redirect to announcement detail page
Announcement record persists in the database with status=published
All employees in selected departments receive a notification
A webhook event of type announcement.published is emitted
tests.executable:
def test_publish_announcement_to_multiple_departments_succeeds(
    admin_page,          # <fixture>: authenticated Playwright page as admin
    dept_factory,        # <fixture>: creates/tears-down departments
    announcement_cleanup,# <fixture>: deletes announcement after test
    webhook_sink,        # <fixture>: captures outbound webhook calls
):
    depts = dept_factory.create_many(2)
    dept_ids = [d["id"] for d in depts]

    page = admin_page
    page.goto("/org-announcements/new")
    page.fill("[data-testid='ann-title']", "EP Test Announcement")
    page.fill("[data-testid='ann-body']", "Body text for EP test.")
    select_departments(page, dept_ids)  # <helper_fn>
    page.click("[data-testid='btn-publish']")

    expect_success_state(page)  # <helper_fn>: asserts redirect/success banner

    ann = get_announcement_by_title("EP Test Announcement")  # <helper_fn>
    assert ann["status"] == "published"
    assert set(ann["department_ids"]) == set(dept_ids)

    events = webhook_sink.received_events(event_type="announcement.published")
    assert len(events) == 1
    assert events[0]["payload"]["announcement_id"] == ann["id"]

tests.name: test_publish_announcement_without_departments_returns_422
preconditions: No department is selected before submission
actions: Fill in announcement title and body
expected: Form submission is rejected with an error indicator (HTTP 422 or inline validation error)
Error message references missing department selection
No announcement record is created in the database
trace: R-WEB-089: error pathway — 422 when no departments selected
tests.executable:
def test_publish_announcement_without_departments_returns_422(
    admin_page,
    webhook_sink,
    api_client,          # <fixture>: authenticated HTTP client for assertions
):
    page = admin_page
    page.goto("/org-announcements/new")
    page.fill("[data-testid='ann-title']", "NEG No-Dept Announcement")
    page.fill("[data-testid='ann-body']", "Should be rejected.")
    # Intentionally skip department selection
    page.click("[data-testid='btn-publish']")

    error_locator = page.locator("[data-testid='dept-error']")
    assert error_locator.is_visible(), "Expected department validation error"
    error_text = error_locator.inner_text()
    assert "department" in error_text.lower()

    resp = api_client.get(
        "/api/announcements",
        params={"title": "NEG No-Dept Announcement"}
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    assert resp.json()["total"] == 0, "Announcement must not have been persisted"

    assert webhook_sink.received_events(event_type="announcement.published") == []

tests.name: test_publish_announcement_to_exactly_one_department_accepted
preconditions: Exactly one department exists and is available for selection
actions: Fill in announcement title and body
Select exactly one department (minimum valid boundary)
expected: Announcement is accepted and created with status=published
Only employees in that single department are notified
A webhook event of type announcement.published is emitted with correct department scope
trace: R-WEB-089: boundary — minimum department count of 1 is accepted
tests.executable:
def test_publish_announcement_to_exactly_one_department_accepted(
    admin_page,
    dept_factory,
    announcement_cleanup,
    webhook_sink,
):
    dept = dept_factory.create_one()  # <helper_fn> via fixture
    dept_id = dept["id"]

    page = admin_page
    page.goto("/org-announcements/new")
    page.fill("[data-testid='ann-title']", "BVA Single-Dept Announcement")
    page.fill("[data-testid='ann-body']", "Boundary: one department only.")
    select_departments(page, [dept_id])  # <helper_fn>
    page.click("[data-testid='btn-publish']")

    expect_success_state(page)  # <helper_fn>

    ann = get_announcement_by_title("BVA Single-Dept Announcement")  # <helper_fn>
    assert ann["status"] == "published"
    assert ann["department_ids"] == [dept_id]

    events = webhook_sink.received_events(event_type="announcement.published")
    assert len(events) == 1
    assert events[0]["payload"]["department_ids"] == [dept_id]

tests.name: test_announcement_state_transitions_from_draft_to_published
preconditions: A saved draft announcement exists with at least one department selected
actions: Navigate to the existing draft announcement edit page
Click the Publish button to trigger the draft → published transition
expected: Announcement status changes from draft to published
UI reflects the published state (badge, button state change)
A webhook event of type announcement.published is emitted exactly once
Attempting to re-publish has no duplicate effect
trace: R-WEB-089: webhook event emitted on state change
R-WEB-089: additional variant semantics — idempotent publish
tests.executable:
def test_announcement_state_transitions_from_draft_to_published(
    admin_page,
    draft_announcement,  # <fixture>: creates draft with one dept; yields {id, edit_url}
    webhook_sink,
):
    ann_id = draft_announcement["id"]
    edit_url = draft_announcement["edit_url"]

    page = admin_page
    page.goto(edit_url)

    status_badge = page.locator("[data-testid='status-badge']")
    assert status_badge.inner_text().lower() == "draft"

    page.click("[data-testid='btn-publish']")
    expect_success_state(page)  # <helper_fn>

    assert status_badge.inner_text().lower() == "published"

    ann = get_announcement_by_id(ann_id)  # <helper_fn>
    assert ann["status"] == "published"

    events = webhook_sink.received_events(event_type="announcement.published")
    assert len(events) == 1, "Webhook must fire exactly once on publish"

    # Idempotency: second publish attempt must not duplicate the event
    page.click("[data-testid='btn-publish']")
    events_after_retry = webhook_sink.received_events(event_type="announcement.published")
    assert len(events_after_retry) == 1, "Re-publish must not emit duplicate webhook"

tests.name: test_publish_decision_table_dept_selected_vs_not_selected
preconditions: Two departments exist in the organisation
actions: Attempt publish with departments=[dept_a, dept_b] — expect success
Attempt publish with departments=[] — expect 422 / validation error
expected: With valid departments: announcement created, webhook fired
With empty departments: error shown, no announcement created, no webhook
trace: R-WEB-089: decision table — departments selected (Y/N) drives accept/reject outcome
R-WEB-089: error pathway — 422 when no departments selected
tests.executable:
import pytest

@pytest.mark.parametrize("dept_count,expect_success", [
    (2, True),
    (0, False),
])
def test_publish_decision_table_dept_selected_vs_not_selected(
    admin_page,
    dept_factory,
    announcement_cleanup,
    webhook_sink,
    api_client,
    dept_count,
    expect_success,
):
    depts = dept_factory.create_many(dept_count) if dept_count > 0 else []
    dept_ids = [d["id"] for d in depts]
    title = f"DT Announcement depts={dept_count}"

    page = admin_page
    page.goto("/org-announcements/new")
    page.fill("[data-testid='ann-title']", title)
    page.fill("[data-testid='ann-body']", "Decision table body.")
    if dept_ids:
        select_departments(page, dept_ids)  # <helper_fn>
    page.click("[data-testid='btn-publish']")

    if expect_success:
        expect_success_state(page)  # <helper_fn>
        ann = get_announcement_by_title(title)  # <helper_fn>
        assert ann["status"] == "published"
        events = webhook_sink.received_events(event_type="announcement.published")
        assert len(events) == 1
    else:
        assert page.locator("[data-testid='dept-error']").is_visible()
        resp = api_client.get("/api/announcements", params={"title": title})
        assert resp.json()["total"] == 0
        assert webhook_sink.received_events(event_type="announcement.published") == []
